verses.latin_vulgate: Audite hoc, sacerdotes,  et attendite, domus Israël,  et domus regis, auscultate :  quia vobis judicium est,  quoniam laqueus facti estis speculationi,  et rete expansum super Thabor.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁמְעוּ־זֹ֨את הַכֹּהֲנִ֜ים וְהַקְשִׁ֣יבוּ ׀ בֵּ֣ית יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל וּבֵ֤ית הַמֶּ֙לֶךְ֙ הַאֲזִ֔ינוּ כִּ֥י לָכֶ֖ם הַמִּשְׁפָּ֑ט כִּי־פַח֙ הֱיִיתֶ֣ם לְמִצְפָּ֔ה וְרֶ֖שֶׁת פְּרוּשָׂ֥ה עַל־תָּבֽוֹר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Hear ye this, O priests, and hearken, O ye house of Israel, and give ear, O house of the king: for there is a judgment against you, because you have been a snare to them whom you should have watched over and a net spread upon Thabor.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuulkaat siis papit, ja Israelin huone, ottakaat vaari, ja ota korviis sinä kuninkaan huone; sillä tuomio pitää tuleman teidän päällenne, te, jotka Mitspassa paulan ja levitetyn verkon Taborissa virittäneet olette.
verses.king_james: Hear ye this, O priests; and hearken, ye house of Israel; and give ye ear, O house of the king; for judgment is toward you, because ye have been a snare on Mizpah, and a net spread upon Tabor.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et victimas declinastis in profundum ;  et ego eruditor omnium eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשַׁחֲטָ֥ה שֵׂטִ֖ים הֶעְמִ֑יקוּ וַאֲנִ֖י מוּסָ֥ר לְכֻלָּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And you have turned aside victims into the depth and I am the teacher of them all.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ne luopuvaiset teurastavat sangen paljon; sentähden tulee minun heitä kaikkia rangaista.
verses.king_james: And the revolters are profound to make slaughter, though I have been a rebuker of them all.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego scio Ephraim,  et Israël non est absconditus a me :  quia nunc fornicatus est Ephraim ;  contaminatus est Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲנִי֙ יָדַ֣עְתִּי אֶפְרַ֔יִם וְיִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל לֹא־נִכְחַ֣ד מִמֶּ֑נִּי כִּ֤י עַתָּה֙ הִזְנֵ֣יתָ אֶפְרַ֔יִם נִטְמָ֖א יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: I know Ephraim, and Israel is not hid from me for now Ephraim hath committed fornication, Israel is defiled.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kyllä minä tunnen Ephraimin, ja ei Israel ole minun edestäni peitetty; että Ephraim on nyt portto ja Israel saastainen.
verses.king_james: I know Ephraim, and Israel is not hid from me: for now, O Ephraim, thou committest whoredom, and Israel is defiled.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non dabunt cogitationes suas ut revertantur ad Deum suum,  quia spiritus fornicationum in medio eorum,  et Dominum non cognoverunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹ֤א יִתְּנוּ֙ מַ֣עַלְלֵיהֶ֔ם לָשׁ֖וּב אֶל־אֱלֹֽהֵיהֶ֑ם כִּ֣י ר֤וּחַ זְנוּנִים֙ בְּקִרְבָּ֔ם וְאֶת־יְהֹוָ֖ה לֹ֥א יָדָֽעוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: They will not set their thoughts to return to their God: for the spirit of fornication is in the midst of them, and they have not known the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ei he ajattele palata Jumalansa tykö; sillä huoruuden henki on heidän sydämessänsä, ja ei he tottele Herraa.
verses.king_james: They will not frame their doings to turn unto their God: for the spirit of whoredoms is in the midst of them, and they have not known the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et respondebit arrogantia Israël in facie ejus,  et Israël et Ephraim ruent in iniquitate sua :  ruet etiam Judas cum eis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעָנָ֥ה גְאֽוֹן־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל בְּפָנָ֑יו וְיִשְׂרָאֵ֣ל וְאֶפְרַ֗יִם יִכָּֽשְׁלוּ֙ בַּעֲוֺנָ֔ם כָּשַׁ֥ל גַּם־יְהוּדָ֖ה עִמָּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the pride of Israel shall answer in his face: and Israel, and Ephraim shall fall in their iniquity, Juda also shall fall with them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden pitää Israelin ylpeys hänen kasvoinsa edessä nöyryytettämän; ja Israel ja Ephraim pitää pahain tekoinsa tähden lankeeman; Juudan pitää myös heidän kanssansa lankeeman.
verses.king_james: And the pride of Israel doth testify to his face: therefore shall Israel and Ephraim fall in their iniquity; Judah also shall fall with them.

verses.latin_vulgate: In gregibus suis et in armentis suis vadent ad quærendum Dominum,  et non invenient :  ablatus est ab eis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּצֹאנָ֣ם וּבִבְקָרָ֗ם יֵ֥לְכ֛וּ לְבַקֵּ֥שׁ אֶת־יְהֹוָ֖ה וְלֹ֣א יִמְצָ֑אוּ חָלַ֖ץ מֵהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: With their flocks and with their herds, they shall go to seek the Lord, and shall not find him: he is withdrawn from them.
verses.finnish_biblia: He menevät sitte etsimään Herraa lampaillansa ja karjallansa, vaan ei heidän pidä sittekään häntä löytämän; hän on itsensä heiltä kääntänyt pois.
verses.king_james: They shall go with their flocks and with their herds to seek the Lord; but they shall not find him; he hath withdrawn himself from them.

verses.latin_vulgate: In Dominum prævaricati sunt,  quia filios alienos genuerunt :  nunc devorabit eos mensis, cum partibus suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בַּיהֹוָ֣ה בָּגָ֔דוּ כִּי־בָנִ֥ים זָרִ֖ים יָלָ֑דוּ עַתָּ֛ה יֹאכְלֵ֥ם חֹ֖דֶשׁ אֶת־חֶלְקֵיהֶֽם׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: They have transgressed against the Lord: for they have begotten children that are strangers: now shall a month devour them with their portions.
verses.finnish_biblia: He ovat rikkoneet Herraa vastaan ja synnyttäneet vieraita lapsia; sentähden pitää myös uuden kuun syömän heitä ynnä heidän osainsa kanssa.
verses.king_james: They have dealt treacherously against the Lord: for they have begotten strange children: now shall a month devour them with their portions.

verses.latin_vulgate: Clangite buccina in Gabaa,  tuba in Rama ;  ululate in Bethaven,  post tergum tuum, Benjamin.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תִּקְע֤וּ שׁוֹפָר֙ בַּגִּבְעָ֔ה חֲצֹצְרָ֖ה בָּרָמָ֑ה הָרִ֙יעוּ֙ בֵּ֣ית אָ֔וֶן אַחֲרֶ֖יךָ בִּנְיָמִֽין׃
verses.douay_rheims: Blow ye the cornet in Gabaa, the trumpet in Rama: howl ye in Bethaven, behind thy back, O Benjamin.
verses.finnish_biblia: Soittakaat basunaa Gibeassa, soittakaat torvea Ramassa, huutakaat Betavenissa: Sinun jälkees Benjamin!
verses.king_james: Blow ye the cornet in Gibeah, and the trumpet in Ramah: cry aloud at Beth–aven, after thee, O Benjamin.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ephraim in desolatione erit in die correptionis ;  in tribubus Israël ostendi fidem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶפְרַ֙יִם֙ לְשַׁמָּ֣ה תִֽהְיֶ֔ה בְּי֖וֹם תּוֹכֵחָ֑ה בְּשִׁבְטֵי֙ יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל הוֹדַ֖עְתִּי נֶאֱמָנָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Ephraim shall be in desolation in the day of rebuke: among the tribes of Israel I have shewn that which shall surely be.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Ephraimin pitää rangaistuksen päivänä kylmillä oleman; josta minä Israelin sukukuntia uskollisesti olen neuvonut.
verses.king_james: Ephraim shall be desolate in the day of rebuke: among the tribes of Israel have I made known that which shall surely be.

verses.latin_vulgate: Facti sunt principes Juda quasi assumentes terminum ;  super eos effundam quasi aquam iram meam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָיוּ֙ שָׂרֵ֣י יְהוּדָ֔ה כְּמַסִּיגֵ֖י גְּב֑וּל עֲלֵיהֶ֕ם אֶשְׁפּ֥וֹךְ כַּמַּ֖יִם עֶבְרָתִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: The princes of Juda are become as they that take up the bound: I will pour out my wrath upon them like water.
verses.finnish_biblia: Juudan päämiehet ovat niinkuin rajan siirtäjät; sentähden tahdon minä vihani vuodattaa heidän päällensä, niinkuin veden.
verses.king_james: The princes of Judah were like them that remove the bound: therefore I will pour out my wrath upon them like water.

verses.latin_vulgate: Calumniam patiens est Ephraim, fractus judicio,  quoniam cœpit abire post sordes.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עָשׁ֥וּק אֶפְרַ֖יִם רְצ֣וּץ מִשְׁפָּ֑ט כִּ֣י הוֹאִ֔יל הָלַ֖ךְ אַחֲרֵי־צָֽו׃
verses.douay_rheims: Ephraim is under oppression, and broken in judgment: because he began to go after filthiness.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ephraim kärsii väkivaltaa ja ahdistetaan, joka hänelle oikein tapahtuu; sillä hän antoi itsensä (ihmisten) käskyihin.
verses.king_james: Ephraim is oppressed and broken in judgment, because he willingly walked after the commandment.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ego quasi tinea Ephraim,  et quasi putredo domui Juda.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲנִ֥י כָעָ֖שׁ לְאֶפְרָ֑יִם וְכָרָקָ֖ב לְבֵ֥ית יְהוּדָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I will be like a moth to Ephraim: and like rottenness to the house of Juda.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä olin Ephraimille niinkuin koi, ja Juudan huoneelle turmelus.
verses.king_james: Therefore will I be unto Ephraim as a moth, and to the house of Judah as rottenness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et vidit Ephraim languorem suum,  et Juda vinculum suum ;  et abiit Ephraim ad Assur,  et misit ad regem ultorem :  et ipse non poterit sanare vos,  nec solvere poterit a vobis vinculum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֨רְא אֶפְרַ֜יִם אֶת־חׇלְי֗וֹ וִֽיהוּדָה֙ אֶת־מְזֹר֔וֹ וַיֵּ֤לֶךְ אֶפְרַ֙יִם֙ אֶל־אַשּׁ֔וּר וַיִּשְׁלַ֖ח אֶל־מֶ֣לֶךְ יָרֵ֑ב וְה֗וּא לֹ֤א יוּכַל֙ לִרְפֹּ֣א לָכֶ֔ם וְלֹא־יִגְהֶ֥ה מִכֶּ֖ם מָזֽוֹר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Ephraim saw his sickness, and Juda his band: and Ephraim went to the Assyrian, and sent to the avenging king: and he shall not be able to heal you, neither shall he be able to take off the band from you.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta kuin Ephraim tunsi sairautensa ja Juuda haavansa, niin Ephraim meni Assyriaan, ja lähetti kuninkaan Jarebin tykö; vaan ei hän voinut teitä auttaa, eikä parantaa teidän haavojanne.
verses.king_james: When Ephraim saw his sickness, and Judah saw his wound, then went Ephraim to the Assyrian, and sent to king Jareb: yet could he not heal you, nor cure you of your wound.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam ego quasi leæna Ephraim,  et quasi catulus leonis domui Juda.  Ego, ego capiam, et vadam ;  tollam, et non est qui eruat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י אָנֹכִ֤י כַשַּׁ֙חַל֙ לְאֶפְרַ֔יִם וְכַכְּפִ֖יר לְבֵ֣ית יְהוּדָ֑ה אֲנִ֨י אֲנִ֤י אֶטְרֹף֙ וְאֵלֵ֔ךְ אֶשָּׂ֖א וְאֵ֥ין מַצִּֽיל׃
verses.douay_rheims: For I will be like a lioness to Ephraim, and like a lion's whelp to the house of Juda: I, I will catch, and go: I will take away, and there is none that can rescue.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä minä olen Ephraimille niinkuin julma jalopeura, ja Juudan huoneelle niinkuin nuori jalopeura. Minä, minä itse heitä raatelen, ja menen pois, minä vien heidät pois, ja ei kenkään heitä voi pelastaa.
verses.king_james: For I will be unto Ephraim as a lion, and as a young lion to the house of Judah: I, even I, will tear and go away; I will take away, and none shall rescue him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vadens revertar ad locum meum,  donec deficiatis, et quæratis faciem meam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵלֵ֤ךְ אָשׁ֙וּבָה֙ אֶל־מְקוֹמִ֔י עַ֥ד אֲשֶֽׁר־יֶאְשְׁמ֖וּ וּבִקְשׁ֣וּ פָנָ֑י בַּצַּ֥ר לָהֶ֖ם יְשַׁחֲרֻֽנְנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will go and return to my place: until you are consumed, and seek my face.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä menen ja palajan taas sijalleni, siihenasti kuin he syntinsä tuntevat, ja minun kasvojani etsivät; kuin heille pahoin käy, niin heidän pitää varhain minua etsimän (ja sanoman:)
verses.king_james: I will go and return to my place, till they acknowledge their offence, and seek my face: in their affliction they will seek me early.
